motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution: 
```class Solution:

    def __init__(self, w: List[int]):
        self.prefix_sum = [0] * (len(w) + 1)
        for i in range(len(w)):
            self.prefix_sum[i + 1] = self.prefix_sum[i] + w[i]

    def pickIndex(self) -> int:
        import random
        target = random.randint(0, self.prefix_sum[-1] - 1)
        for i in range(len(self.prefix_sum)):
            if target < self.prefix_sum[i]:
                return i - 1
```

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(1)
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
